description: If you don't see your question in the list, feel free to contact us.

items.a: All services are performed by our students in training, always under the direct supervision of qualified teachers.

items.q: Is it safe to get treatments here?
items.a: Absolutely. Teachers evaluate and guide every step of the process to ensure your safety and an excellent result.
Since it is a learning environment, treatments may take a bit longer than in a conventional salon. We appreciate your patience.

items.q: Do the services have any cost?
items.a: They have very reduced prices, intended solely to cover the cost of professional materials used during practices.

items.q: What happens if I'm not satisfied?
items.a: Our teachers are present to intervene at any time and ensure the final result meets standards.

items.q: Can I choose which student attends me?
items.a: Assignments are based on rotations and the students' learning needs, so it is not possible to choose.

items.q: What kind of products do you use?
items.a: We exclusively use top-brand professional hairdressing and aesthetic products.

items.q: Is it mandatory to book in advance?
items.a: Yes, it is essential to reserve your spot through this platform to properly organize the classes.

items.q: Can I cancel my appointment if something comes up?
items.a: Of course. We kindly ask you to do so as far in advance as possible from the application so we can assign the turn to someone else.
Our opening hours are strictly linked to the school's teaching hours and modules.
